## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest --cov=homefinance --cov-fail-under=80` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] **No real financial data, account numbers, statement files, or tokens** are
      included in the diff, tests, or fixtures
- [ ] YNAB access remains read-only; no data leaves the machine beyond existing
      read-only `api.ynab.com` calls

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs made, or follow-ups deferred.
